contract.initial_term_start: from date of agreement signing (not go-live date)

onboarding_timeline.note: If property needs furnishing, add 4-8 weeks for that phase

listing_model.note: Each property has its own listing, photos, and reviews. Properties are NOT pooled or grouped.

pricing.model: Dynamic pricing algorithm, updates every 24 hours
pricing.direct_booking: ~40% of portfolio via direct booking infrastructure

communication.model: Named property manager, direct message line
communication.response_sla: Same business day for operational queries

damage_reporting.insurance_support: Stayful assists with Airbnb AirCover or standalone STL insurance claims

owner_calendar_access.blocking: Owner can block dates at any time for personal use

guest_standards.screening: Profile review, review history check, decline criteria for high-risk bookings
guest_standards.party_protection: Noise monitoring available on request, booking length restrictions in party-risk areas
